overall.description: A cinematic night-time walk through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning with observation of a hovering aerial vehicle above neon-lit skyscrapers, then proceeding along waterfront promenades and elevated walkways with dense neon signage and sparse pedestrian traffic.

events.description: camera begins slow leftward pan to track the hovering aerial vehicle

agents.ego_description: standing on the waterfront promenade looking up at the hovering aerial vehicle, then slowly panning left to follow it

notable_agents.action: large aerial vehicle hovering stationary above the city skyline with glowing thrusters

entered.detail: futuristic aerial vehicle with glowing thrusters hovering above the skyscrapers
dense cluster of skyscrapers with illuminated windows and colorful neon signage
metal safety railing along the water's edge
tall building with prominent red neon signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark waterfront promenade with a stunning view of a neon-lit cyberpunk skyline. An aerial vehicle hovers silently above the skyscrapers as the camera slowly pans left to track it. The area is devoid of pedestrians, emphasizing the scale of the towering buildings and the hovering craft.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with pedestrian walkway and adjacent road

events.description: camera turns down from sky view and begins walking along the waterfront promenade
ground vehicles pass by on the road to the left of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, passing groups of pedestrians and approaching an overpass

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead along the promenade

entered.detail: massive building with distinctive rectangular arch structure framing the skyline
elevated highway or transit structure crossing overhead with support pillars
tall street lamps illuminating the walkway with warm light

segments.scene_description: The camera turns from the sky and begins walking along the waterfront promenade, joining sparse pedestrian traffic. A massive arch-shaped building dominates the left side while vehicles pass on the adjacent road. The camera approaches an overpass structure as it continues along the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway with glass wind barriers

events.description: entering covered section of walkway with glass barriers overlooking the water

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered walkway alongside the water, passing glass barriers and occasional pedestrians

entered.detail: transparent safety barrier with metal frames separating walkway from the water below
bridge structure visible in the distance across the water with lights

segments.scene_description: The walkway enters a covered section with glass barriers protecting from the wind. The water is visible through the transparent panels on the right, while the left side is enclosed by building structures. The lighting becomes more artificial and diffused under the overhead cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated neon-lit pedestrian walkway with overhead signage

events.description: transitioning to elevated walkway with distinctive orange flooring and overhead neon structures
passing under large overhead neon archway with multiple digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange elevated walkway, following a pedestrian ahead under glowing neon structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking ahead on the orange walkway

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian path with distinctive orange textured metal flooring
large overhead framework with glowing orange and white neon lights forming an arcade
large digital billboard displaying MEGA MART advertisement
large vertical billboard with health warning text and medical imagery

segments.scene_description: The walkway transitions to an elevated orange-tiled path covered by an elaborate overhead neon structure. Large digital billboards including a health warning sign and Mega Mart advertisement line the route. The camera follows a pedestrian ahead through this neon-lit corridor, approaching a street intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, atmospheric view of a neon-lit skyline into the dense, artificial corridors of a cyberpunk city. It begins on a dark waterfront promenade, panning left to track a silent aerial vehicle hovering above towering skyscrapers. As the camera turns from the sky, it moves along the water's edge past a massive arch-shaped building and sparse pedestrians before approaching a structural overpass. The scene then shifts into a covered walkway where glass barriers shield the path from the wind and the lighting becomes more diffused. Finally, the environment transitions onto an elevated orange-tiled path beneath an elaborate neon canopy, following a pedestrian past glowing digital billboards toward a busy street intersection.
